name: add_redis_caching
avoid: do not cache user-specific data without scoping keys
brief_template:
To add Redis caching:
1. Add Redis client lib (redis-py, ioredis, go-redis, etc.)
2. Create cache abstraction/wrapper in project language
3. Define cache key naming convention: '<service>:<entity>:<id>'
4. Set TTL based on data volatility (e.g., 300s for hot data)
5. Handle cache misses gracefully (fallback to DB)
6. Add cache invalidation on writes
7. Monitor cache hit rate
